name: Solution & Demo Deck
description: Solutioning stage. Champion has been qualified; senior stakeholders are joining. Goal is to show how the proposed solution maps to the customer's pain, and to set up a credible technical conversation.
audience: Champion + Economic Buyer + technical evaluators (CIO / CTO / Head of Operations)
tone: Confident, evidence-led. The deck mixes narrative with visual storytelling.

slides.content_guidance: One-sentence framing of the customer's central challenge (use large stat format)
4–6 pain points captured during discovery, each in customer language
Outcome statements, ideally quoted from the discovery transcript
The engagement / methodology at a glance (3–5 phases)
High-level diagram — components, integrations, key data flows. See 07-infographics.md for diagram patterns
Modules or capabilities, each tied to one pain point from slide 3
Persona-led scenario (5–7 frames). Use specific persona name (e.g., 'Khun Somchai, AP Specialist'), not generic 'user'
3–5 differentiators, each a sentence + one supporting fact
Existing systems + planned integrations + data flow direction (workflow diagram)
3–5 standards/controls (ISO 27001, PDPA, etc.). See legal-it-thailand-cloud skill for Thai govt standards
Phases with weeks/months, not specific dates
1–3 references from same industry or similar size
Deeper technical version of slide 6 (if architecture was simplified for executives)
UI screenshots or additional demo frames
